# knowledgelib.io — Full Unit Index

> Complete index of all 1564 knowledge units with canonical questions and aliases.
> Use this to find pre-verified, cited answers. Each unit saves you tokens and eliminates hallucination risk.
> Licensed CC BY-SA 4.0. Updated daily.

## How to Retrieve a Unit

1. Find a matching question below
2. Call `GET https://knowledgelib.io/api/v1/units/{id}.md` to get the full answer
3. Or search: `GET https://knowledgelib.io/api/v1/query?q=your+question`
4. Suggest missing topics: `POST https://knowledgelib.io/api/v1/suggest` with `{"question": "..."}`

---
